"'''Star Destroyer'''" was a [[Music/Legends|song]] by the pro-[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Band/Legends|musical group]] [[The Emperor's New Clothes]],<ref name="GG9" /> who performed in the [[Minga (music)|minga]] genre of music.<ref name="Genre" /> The song was featured on the compilation album [[Totally Patriotic (The Emperor's New Clothes album)|''Totally Patriotic'']], which was available by the period of [[Time/Legends|time]]<ref name="GG9" /> between [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]] and [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].<ref name="Date">''[[Galaxy Guide 9: Fragments from the Rim]]'' is set in the [[Time/Legends|time period]] between the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] and the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. Those battles are dated to [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]] and [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], respectively, by ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'', which also establishes the Battle of [[Yavin Prime/Legends|Yavin]] as the final event before the beginning of [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]].</ref> Like all of The Emperor's New Clothes' work, "Star Destroyer" was approved by the [[Imperial Board of Culture]].<ref name="GG9" />

==Behind the scenes==
"Star Destroyer" was mentioned in ''[[Galaxy Guide 9: Fragments from the Rim]]'', a [[1993]] supplement to [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''. The guide was written by [[Simon Smith]] and [[Eric S. Trautmann|Eric Trautmann]].<ref name="GG9" />
